entries.title: Cinematic scanner pulses join HoloSuite
entries.summary: Reveal GM-placed scan targets with a table-ready scanner pulse, visibility controls, range handling, and system-agnostic target data.

entries.title: Ship loadouts join HoloSuite
entries.summary: Create system-agnostic ship profiles with equipment slots, power allocation, damage tracking, ship-image pins, and player-facing install or activation permissions.
